basic_details.job_title: NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Rourkela (NIT Rourkela)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Rourkela (NIT Rourkela) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 20-07-2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Upper age limit 32 years, relaxed by 5 years for SC/ST/PWD/Female and 3 years for OBC (Non-creamy layer).
age_limit.details: Upper age limit: 32 years. Age relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/PWD/Female candidates and 3 years for OBC (Non-creamy layer) candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech/B.E in Civil Engineering with minimum CGPA of 7.0 or 65% and M.E/M.Tech. in Transportation Engineering/equivalent with minimum CGPA of 6.5 or 60% from recognized technical Institute/University with 1st class career throughout. For Engineering and Science disciplines (except Life Science), a candidate should have passed Mathematics in +2 Science or Diploma.
qualification.details: B.Tech/B.E in Civil Engineering with minimum CGPA of 7.0 or 65% and M.E/M.Tech. in Transportation Engineering/equivalent with minimum CGPA of 6.5 or 60% from recognized technical Institute/University with 1st class career throughout. For Engineering and Science disciplines (except Life Science), a candidate should have passed Mathematics in +2 Science or Diploma. Desirable: experience in the related field.

salary_details.pay_scale: INR 37,000/- per month for Year 1 & 2, INR 42,000/- per month for Year 3
salary_details.details: INR 37,000/- per month for Year 1 & 2 INR 42,000/- per month for Year 3

selection_process: Shortlisting based on merit and need of the project. Walk-in (offline) Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 20-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.Tech/B.E in Civil Engineering with a minimum CGPA of 7.0 or 65% and an M.E/M.Tech. in Transportation Engineering or equivalent with a minimum CGPA of 6.5 or 60%. A first-class career throughout is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, the upper age limit of 32 years is relaxed by 5 years for SC/ST/PWD/Female candidates and by 3 years for OBC (Non-creamy layer) candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position?
faq.answer: The salary is INR 37,000/- per month for the first two years and INR 42,000/- per month for the third year.

faq.question: Q5. How should I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be sent via email. You need to prepare your application with all required documents and send it as a single PDF file to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on merit and project requirements, followed by a walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there a walk-in interview date?
faq.answer: Yes, the walk-in interview is scheduled for 24-07-2026.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: This is a project-based position, indicating a temporary or contractual role tied to a specific research project.

faq.question: Q10. Where is NIT Rourkela located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Rourkela is located in Rourkela, Odisha, with the pincode 769008.
